name: To Ship Someone
original_name: 全世界都在等你们分手
overview: Pessimistic novelist Ji Shu, known for tragic endings, clashes with optimistic screenwriter Song Yan Qi, who wants to adapt his work with a happy ending. When they are pulled into his novel, they must rewrite the story while navigating their growing feelings—unsure if their own tale will end in joy or heartbreak.

trailers.title: Trailer: Although the First Encounter is Accidental and Love is Inevitable | To Ship Someone | iQIYI
